title: ToolDefinition
description: Schema for the Discovery Tool DefinitionContent payload (VersionNeutral/ToolDefinition.cs). Validated by ToolDefinitionContentValidator.

category.description: Category used to group and discover the tool.

license.description: Optional SPDX license identifier or license text.

infra.description: One or more infrastructure definitions that back the tool's actions.

actions.description: Tool actions that can be invoked by Discovery.

code_environments.description: Code execution environments available for this tool.

InfraDefinition.title: InfraDefinition
InfraDefinition.description: Describes a single infrastructure node (container + compute) that powers one or more actions.

name.description: Logical name for this infra node; referenced by actions via infra_node.

ImageConfig.title: ImageConfig
ImageConfig.description: Container image configuration for an infrastructure node.

acr.description: Fully-qualified Azure Container Registry image reference (e.g. 'myregistry.azurecr.io/myimage:latest').

ComputeConfig.title: ComputeConfig
ComputeConfig.description: Compute resource requirements and scaling configuration for an infrastructure node.

recommended_sku.description: Ordered list of recommended Azure VM SKU names (e.g. 'Standard_NC24ads_A100_v4').

pool_type.description: Pool type for the compute node (snake_case variant).

poolType.description: Pool type for the compute node (camelCase variant; use either pool_type or poolType).

pool_size.description: Number of nodes in the pool (snake_case variant).

poolSize.description: Number of nodes in the pool (camelCase variant; use either pool_size or poolSize).

VmSku.title: VmSku
VmSku.description: Resource specification for a compute node. Numeric fields accept both integer (4) and string ('4') values.

ToolAction.title: ToolAction
ToolAction.description: A discrete, invocable action exposed by this tool.

name.description: Unique action name within this tool.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this action does.

infra_node.description: Reference to an infra[].name entry that runs this action.

command.description: Entrypoint command executed inside the container for this action.

environment_variables.description: Static environment variables injected into the container.

inline_files.description: Files written into the container at the specified mount paths before execution.

output_mount_configurations.description: Container paths that produce output assets after action execution.

ToolInputSchema.title: ToolInputSchema
ToolInputSchema.description: JSON-Schema-style definition of the inputs accepted by a tool action.

properties.description: Map of parameter name to its JSON Schema definition. Values are open-ended JSON Schema objects.

required.description: List of property names that are required when invoking this action.

ToolEnvironmentVariable.title: ToolEnvironmentVariable
ToolEnvironmentVariable.description: A static environment variable injected into the container at runtime.

InlineFile.title: InlineFile
InlineFile.description: A file written into the container at a specified path before action execution.

mount_path.description: Absolute path inside the container where the file is written.

OutputMountConfiguration.title: OutputMountConfiguration
OutputMountConfiguration.description: Configures a container path that produces an output asset after action execution.

mount_path.description: Absolute container path that will contain the output after execution.

auto_promote.description: When true, the output is automatically promoted to a Discovery data asset.

output_name.description: Name of the resulting output asset.

output_description.description: Description of the resulting output asset.

CodeEnvironment.title: CodeEnvironment
CodeEnvironment.description: A language runtime environment available for interactive or notebook-style execution.

command.description: Entrypoint command that starts the code execution environment.

description.description: Human-readable description of this code environment.

infra_node.description: Reference to an infra[].name entry that hosts this environment.
